titleStmt.title: SII 26.146: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 146. (A.R. No. 138 of 1909.) SAṄGRĀMANALLŪR, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: This records a gift, made by the king, of land and certain privileges to the architect named Maṇiyaṉ Kayilāyam alias Vīrachōḷa-āchāriyaṉ who built the temple of Vīrachōlīśvaram-uḍaiyār at Koḻumam. It further records that the architect would arrange for the setting up of the images (of the deities) in metal and stone in, and for doing repairs to, the temple as well as for providing paintings in the temple including the Tirunaḍaimāḷigai and the Tiruveḍuttukkaṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ ciṟpācāriyaṉ maṇiyaṉ kayilāyamāṉa viracoḻa Ācāriyaṉukku
nammolai kuṭutta paricāvatu koḻumattu Āḷuṭaiyār viracoḻicuramuṭaiyāraiyum Eḻuntaruḷu
vittu Iṉṉāyanāṟku Upān[ Āti stūpi] pariyantamāka koyiluñ ceytu vimāṉap- pradiṣṭaiyum paṇṇi
yum paṇiyāvatu Ulokattāle Eḻuntaruḷuvikkun tirumeṉikkuñ cilaiyāleḻuntaruḷuvikkun tirumeṉikkum Eṭṭiṉ mutalil nālattoṉṟu poṉṉum nelluṅ koḷvāṉākavum puna
mpu Ikkoyilil Āreṉun taṉmañ ceytārkaḷākil Oṉṟupāti poṉṉum nelluṅ koḷvāṉākavum Ikkoyilil Aḻivacorvaṉavum tirunaṭaimāḷikai tiruveṭuttukkaṭṭi yuṭpa
ṭac cittirameḻutak kaṭavaṉavum Ikkoyilil taṉmaṅkaḷukku Eḻuttu veṭṭak kaṭa vaṉavum pakal coṟukoṇṭu ceyvāṉākavum Iṉṉilam Ivaṉukku vilai Oṟṟitaṉa dhāṉa sūtaṉattukkut taruvatāka
vum vilai Oṟṟitaṉa dhāṉa sūtaṉaṅ kuṭukkumiṭattu Ittevai ceyya vallavaṉukkuk kuṭuppāṉākavum Iṉṉilam Iṟai puravu ciṟṟāyam Elavai yukavai Epperppaṭṭituṅ koḷḷātatākavum
Iṉṉilam Iṉṉāyaṉār koyilil tirumaṭaippaḷḷikkuḷḷa paricāram peṟuvatākavum Ippaṭikku Irupattu mūṉṟāvatu kārmutal nammolai kuṭuttom nantamārayuḷa ṉpāṟpaṭuttuk kuṭukka
paṉmāheśvara rakṣaiḥ—
Digital edition of SII 26.146 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
